fields.label: Site Name
fields.description: A friendly label for this remote site, e.g. 'Production' or 'Warehouse ERP'

fields.label: Site URL
fields.description: Full URL of the remote ERPNext site, e.g. https://erp.example.com (no trailing slash)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: From the remote site: User → API Access → Generate Keys

fields.label: API Secret
fields.description: The API Secret generated alongside the API Key

fields.label: Enable Sync
fields.description: Uncheck to pause sync to this specific site

fields.label: Price List
fields.description: Optional: use this price list when pushing product prices to this site. Leave blank to use standard_rate.

fields.label: Last Product Sync
fields.description: Automatically updated after each sync run

fields.label: Sync Only Item Group
fields.description: If set, only items in this group are synced to this site. Leave blank to sync all items with 'Sync to ERPNext Sites' checked.
